description: SFDF-03 (pinned dependencies): Renovate keeps go.mod/go.sum and GitHub
Actions pinned with automated update PRs. postUpdateOptions gomodTidy
refreshes go.sum so PRs never go stale and CI go mod verify stays green
(RESEARCH Pitfall 4). automerge is disabled: every dependency update
requires human review. github-actions are pinned to commit digests and
enforces a 7-day cooldown before any new version is adopted, the same
release-age principle Beekeeper applies to npm packages.
